summary: Comprehensive testing of BC PO Linkage to Incoming Supply feature (iteration_79). All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. PO draft → incoming supply conversion stores po_draft_id on created supply records. GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/incoming-supply returns linked supply records. BC response created advances planned supply to ordered with bc_po_number and bc_document_id set. BC response linkage is idempotent. BC response rejected/pending does NOT alter linked supply status. PO draft detail GET returns linked_supply_count, linked_supply_status_counts, linked_supply_has_bc_po_number. Frontend Linked Incoming Supply section visible in PO Draft detail drawer showing item, qty, status, BC PO# columns with status count badges.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/incoming-supply - returns linked supply records
Backend: Linked supply records have expected fields (item, incoming_qty, status, bc_po_number)
Backend: GET linked supply returns 404 for nonexistent draft
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_count
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_status_counts
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_has_bc_po_number
Backend: BC response created sets bc_po_number and bc_document_id on linked supply
Backend: BC response created advances planned supply to ordered
Backend: BC response linkage is idempotent (repeat created response updates BC fields)
Backend: BC response rejected does NOT alter linked supply status
Backend: BC response pending does NOT alter linked supply status
Backend: Linked supply has source_reference matching draft_id
Backend: Linked supply has po_draft_id field set
Backend REGRESSION: BC export still works
Backend REGRESSION: Vendor assignment still works
Backend REGRESSION: Submission log still works
Backend REGRESSION: BC response capture still works
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Frontend: Linked Incoming Supply section visible in PO Draft detail drawer
Frontend: Linked supply count badge shows '2 record(s)'
Frontend: Status count badges show 'ordered: 2'
Frontend: Linked supply table visible with Item, Qty, Status, BC PO# columns
Frontend: Linked supply rows show correct BC PO# (PO-9999)
Frontend: Linked supply rows show correct status (ordered) with green badge
Frontend: BC Response section shows 'created' status badge
Frontend: BC Response section shows BC PO# (PO-9999)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1382-1395: GET /po-drafts/{id}/incoming-supply correctly queries inv_incoming_supply by source_reference, returns 404 for nonexistent draft

Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1027-1041: PO draft detail enriched with linked supply summary via MongoDB aggregation on inv_incoming_supply - linked_supply_count, linked_supply_status_counts, linked_supply_has_bc_po_number

Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1178-1189: BC response 'created' handler updates linked supply: planned→ordered with bc_po_number/bc_document_id, already ordered records just get BC fields updated (idempotent)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1469-1473: Conversion stores po_draft_id on newly created supply records
Frontend PODraftDetailDrawer Lines 1313-1322: loadLinkedSupply fetches GET /po-drafts/{id}/incoming-supply

Frontend Linked Incoming Supply section Lines 1675-1718: Shows section only when draft.incoming_supply_created, displays count badge, status count badges (planned/ordered), and linked supply table with item/qty/status/bc_po_number columns
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Draft PO-DRAFT-20260314163256-689B67 (has vendor V10045/Acme Bottle Supply, bc_response_status=created with bc_po_number=PO-9999, has 2 linked supply records SPAM-LITE and TEST-ITEM-WARN both at status=ordered with bc_po_number=PO-9999).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC PO Linkage to Incoming Supply feature fully tested. New endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/incoming-supply returns linked supply records (source_reference=draft_id). PO draft detail enriched with linked_supply_count, linked_supply_status_counts, linked_supply_has_bc_po_number via aggregation. BC response 'created' handler advances planned→ordered and sets bc_po_number/bc_document_id on linked supply (idempotent for already ordered). BC response rejected/pending does NOT alter supply. Conversion stores po_draft_id on new supply records. Frontend shows Linked Incoming Supply section in PO Draft detail drawer (visible when incoming_supply_created=true) with count/status badges and table showing item/qty/status/bc_po_number.

response.records: array of supply records with item, incoming_qty, status, bc_po_number, bc_document_id, source_reference, po_draft_id

po_draft_detail_enrichment.source: MongoDB aggregation on inv_incoming_supply collection where source_reference=draft_id

behavior.planned_supply: Advanced to status='ordered', bc_po_number and bc_document_id set

conversion_po_draft_id.behavior: Stores po_draft_id field on newly created supply records
